title: Joy-Ann Dampies shines at national netball championship
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - A Grade 11 learner at...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - A Grade 11 learner at Nqweba secondary school, Joy-Ann Dampies (17), had the privilege to attend the Telkom Netball Championship held in Cape Town from 6 to 11 July as a member of the U19 squad.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - A Grade 11 learner at Nqweba secondary school, Joy-Ann Dampies (17), had the privilege to attend the Telkom Netball Championship held in Cape Town from 6 to 11 July as a member of the U19 squad."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Here she was selected for the SA development Squad."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She also made good connections at the championship and was spotted by other netball clubs and schools that invited her to join them.","html":"She also made good connections at the championship and was spotted by other netball clubs and schools that invited her to join them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At home, Dampies plays for the local netball club, Morocco Eagles.","html":"At home, Dampies plays for the local netball club, Morocco Eagles."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Joy-Ann Dampies shines at national netball championship
